subcodes.title: Words spoken at Theosophical Society in San Francisco, 1912-10-11
subcodes.first_line: The question of reincarnation is a very important one. It is in need of elucidation and elaboration. It cannot be briefly answered. When we study phenomena
subcodes.subjects: @passage of elementary matter through degrees of existence, @composition and decomposition, @reincarnation, @elementary matter cannot be annihilated
